description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/mtnygard/m2m.modlog. Include a global before_script that runs `mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/$(dirname $REPO_NAME)`, `ln -svf $CI_PROJECT_DIR $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME`, and `cd $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME`. Define two stages, build and deploy; in the build stage add a compile job that executes `go get ./...` then `go build -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/m2m.modlog` and publishes the resulting m2m.modlog file as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a dockerize job that uses the docker:latest image, runs `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`, builds the image with `docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/mtnygard/m2m.modlog .`, and pushes it to the GitLab Container Registry with `docker push registry.gitlab.com/mtnygard/m2m.modlog`.
